description: A student club needs to cancel their reservation for a meeting room.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student group and the specific reservation to be cancelled.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the correct booking in the system.

nodes.task_description: Process the cancellation in the facility scheduling system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully cancels the booking, freeing up the room.

nodes.task_description: Send a cancellation confirmation to the event organizer.
